file_title: Outage Preparedness: Lee's Market Case Study
introduction: Today we will be discussing our preparation and response to the 2025 power outages, with a focus on generator activations. This case study will provide insight into our strategic decision-making and operational efficiency during crisis.

subsections.heading: Overview of 2025 Power Outages Impact
subsections.content:
• National power outages affected over 1.5 million businesses in 2025
• During outages, average business downtime was around 5 hours
• Loss of refrigeration posed potential risks to perishable goods within the retail industry
• The U.S. retail sector's economic loss from outages was estimated at $3.5 billion
• Companies without emergency response plans suffered significantly more damages
• Power outages led to an increase in the use of alternative energy sources like generators and solar panels
• Increased demand for emergency power solutions resulted in higher prices for generators
subsections.justification: The slide provides general information about the power outages in 2025, but does not detail how Lee's Market prepared or Jason Wong's specific actions.

subsections.heading: Generator Activation Strategy & Execution
subsections.content:
• Generator activation is a crucial part of any business continuity plan
• Adequate fuel supply is essential for continuous generator operation
• Generator maintenance is critical for reliable operation during power outages
• Training staff on generator operation procedures can enhance emergency preparedness
• Regular testing of generator activation processes can help identify potential issues
• Ensuring compliance with local regulations is vital when installing and operating generators
• Documentation of generator activation procedures supports compliance and aids staff training
subsections.justification: This slide discusses general strategies and practices for generator activation, but does not mention Lee's Market's specific strategy or activities during the 2025 outages.

subsections.heading: Role of Leadership: Jason Wong's Approach
subsections.content:
• Leaders play a pivotal role in crisis management
• Effective leaders communicate clear guidelines and expectations to their teams
• Jason Wong is known for his hands-on approach and direct communication style
• Wong's leadership style emphasizes the importance of teamwork and collaboration
• Under Jason Wong's leadership, the company implemented numerous operational improvements
• Wong encourages open communication and feedback within the organization
• Jason Wong has a successful track record of leading the company during challenging times
subsections.justification: While this slide outlines Jason Wong's leadership style, it does not provide specific information about how he prepared for the 2025 outages.

conclusion: In conclusion, Lee's Market's effective preparation and strategic response to the power outages ensured minimal disruption to our operations. Moving forward, we should continue to refine and improve our crisis management strategies based on these learnings.
